disagreements.chief_strategist_resolution: Use most conservative CIO manual review posture when agents disagree.
Preserve deterministic operator blocks and escalate risk items to CIO review.

agents.agent_role: Interpret concentration, cash, cluster exposure, HHI, largest position, and top exposures.
agents.summary: This desk's lens: structural safety of portfolio composition against concentration and cluster exposure risks.
key_findings: [DATASET] Cash weight at 95.67% meets min_cash_weight mandate (0.05) but leaves minimal buffer for volatility.
[OPERATOR] VIXY and VXX are tactical positions with CIO-only execution; QBTS and LUNR have satellite mandates with high daily volatility.
[THESIS] Gold-miner risk is absent as no gold-related positions exist in the portfolio.
risk_flags: P1: QBTS position (weight 0.45%) shows 41.97% unrealized PNL gain with 12.37% daily change, exceeding max_position_daily_volume_pct (0.1) threshold.
P2: LUNR position (weight 0.4%) has 7.13% unrealized PNL gain with 3.23% daily change, indicating liquidity risk.
P3: QUBT position (weight 0.19%) shows 11.78% daily change and 30.09% unrealized PNL loss, violating risk-control thresholds.
blocked_actions_observed: QBTS and LUNR positions are satellite mandates with CIO-only execution, preventing direct intervention without operator approval.
allowed_actions_observed: VIXY and VXX tactical positions can be adjusted within CIO-only framework for tactical rebalancing.
affected_theses: No gold-miner positions exist, so gold-related theses are not applicable.
affected_assets: QBTS, LUNR, and QUBT are the only assets with significant volatility and unrealized PNL changes.
blind_spots: No historical volatility data for QBTS, LUNR, and QUBT positions to assess long-term risk exposure.

agents.agent_role: Interpret catalyst calendar, live news brief, ECE themes, portfolio catalysts, and urgent events.

[PRIORITY_INTENSITY] P1 priority: earnings_calendar_and_surprise with 3 immediate catalysts (FDX, MU, NKE) and 1 future catalyst (DAL)
risk_flags: Yen carry-trade unwind risk (2026-06-16)
Fed press conference (2026-06-17)
allowed_actions_observed: Monitor FDX/MU/NKE earnings for surprise impact
Track Yen carry-trade unwind risk for FX liquidity impact
Prepare for Fed press conference (2026-06-17) rate implications
affected_theses: Market exposure to California political shifts
Earnings surprise impact on tech and consumer stocks
FX liquidity risks from yen carry-trade unwind
blind_spots: No explicit operator rules for political catalysts
Limited historical data for political impact on California markets

agents.agent_role: Evaluate active thesis lifecycle states from the configured thesis registry.

[OPERATOR] Deterministic operator blocks require CIO manual review for all active theses
